name: food-delivery
description: Food delivery platform with customer and merchant apps

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:merchant"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run web:customer" "npm run web:merchant"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../customer_frontend && npm install && cd ../merchant_frontend && npm install
